archive_data.question_text: Which country did India beat in the Thomas Cup Finals in 2022?

explanation.english: India defeated Indonesia in the finals of the Thomas Cup 2022 to win the prestigious badminton tournament for the first time.
explanation.tanglish: India 2022 Thomas Cup Final-il Indonesia-ve thottu vijayam petrathu.

archive_data.question_text: Who among the following is a famous performer of Kalbelia dance form?

explanation.english: Gulabo Sapera is a renowned folk dancer from Rajasthan, famous for performing the traditional Kalbelia dance.
explanation.tanglish: Gulabo Sapera Rajasthan sampradhayatha Kalbeliya naatiyathin prasiddhamaana aadarippaalar.

archive_data.question_text: नलवाड़ी मेला किस भारतीय राज्य में आयोजित किया जाता है?

explanation.english: The Nalwadi Fair is a famous cattle fair held annually in the state of Punjab.
explanation.tanglish: Nalwadi mela Punjab maanilathil varuda varuda nadathapadum prasiddhamaana pasu thiruvizha.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following is an example of a Western coast port?

explanation.english: Kandla Port is located in Gujarat and serves as a major port on the western coast of India.
explanation.tanglish: Kandla bandhar India padhigaarathil amaindha Gujarat maanilathil ullathu.

archive_data.question_text: रथ सप्तमी का सांस्कृृतिक उत्सव मुख्य रूप से भारत के किस राज्य में मनाया जाता है?

explanation.english: Rath Saptami is a Hindu festival dedicated to the Sun God, primarily celebrated in the state of Andhra Pradesh.
explanation.tanglish: Rath Saptami Sooriyanuku samarpithamaana hindu thiruvizha, ithu mukkiyamaaga Andhra Pradesh-il kondadappadugirathu.

archive_data.question_text: Who has the power to grant pardons?

explanation.english: Under Article 72 of the Indian Constitution, the President of India has the constitutional power to grant pardons, reprieves, respites or remissions of punishment.
explanation.tanglish: Bharatha Arasangathin Article 72 anusaram, Rashtrapathi mannippu aruludhaluku adhikaram kondirukkiraar.

archive_data.question_text: The aim of 'Poorna Swaraj' was adopted during the 1929 session of the _________ Congress.

explanation.english: The Lahore session of the Indian National Congress in 1929, presided over by Jawaharlal Nehru, adopted the resolution of Poorna Swaraj (Complete Independence).
explanation.tanglish: 1929-aam aandu nadantha Lahore Congress sattathil Poorna Swaraj thirumanam eduthukondathu.
